title: SAGE-Kit Graph Contract v1
description: A language-neutral, portable data boundary. Schema presence does not activate Graph execution, does not create runtime state, does not create a scheduler, does not modify ACTIVE_CONTEXT, does not execute nodes, and does not change project authority. Light governance remains graph-artifact optional.

schema_id.description: Stable identity of the Graph Contract schema used by this instance.

schema_version.description: Version of the Graph Contract instance boundary.

graph_id.description: Authority-scoped identity of this graph instance.

generation.description: Declared graph generation; it does not authorize graph rewriting.

governance_level.description: The externally selected control structure. Governance is independent from permission and autonomy and grants neither.

autonomy_level.description: The host continuation mode, independent from governance. goal-based records that a host may continue only while an external completion verifier, authority envelope, and convergence rule permit it; this field does not grant continuation authority.

completion_verifier.description: Optional external completion verifier reference; the schema does not execute it or treat it as authority.

human_gates.description: Human gate identities or references. Recording a gate cannot open, close, waive, or reclassify it.

nodes.description: Declared nodes only; presence does not create runtime state, scheduling, or execution.

joins.description: Declared join boundaries. Stage 2B owns pure join validation and transition decisions.

identity.description: Identity of the external authority source.

reference.description: Repository-neutral reference to the external authority record.

source_authority.description: Identifies existing source authority; it neither grants authority nor overrides project authority.

depends_on.description: Declared dependency identities; cycle and readiness validation are deferred to Stage 2B.

permission.description: An explicit permission mode recorded from the external authority envelope. It is not inferred from governance, is not granted by this schema, and cannot be upgraded by the node.

verifier.description: Reference to externally defined verification; it is not executed by this schema.

output_contract.description: Stable Node Result v1 envelope identity.

resources.description: Declared resource identities; declarations do not acquire or mutate resources.

classification.description: Whether the node is required or optional; join satisfaction remains a Stage 2B decision.

policy.description: all-required preserves every required node; required-plus-optional preserves required nodes while optional evidence may be unavailable for a recorded reason; first-success is only for redundant, equivalent, read-only exploration. first-success may not bypass a required failure or replace authority, safety, approval, validator, or acceptance decisions. manual-gate records a required named human decision without making it; corrective-join binds a finding, correction, focused evidence, and targeted re-review. Stage 2B owns unsafe-join validation.
